calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-28-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, April 28, 2016 in Department 525:
No Appearance by Respondent/Plaintiff Cruz Keith Family Trust, Joseph Cruz Trustee.
Raymond T. Burke, Esq., (415-777-2040) Specially appearance for Appellant/Defendant Alfred Adler who is not present.

Counsel inform the Court that the parties have come to a settlement out of Court.
Court informed Counsel that it is duly noted.

No new evidence is submitted or retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Michael Raifsnider; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-08-2016 Judgment Entered
